commits.commitMessage: fix: text field validation rejecting localized object values (#15932)
fix: use Sec-Fetch-Site header for cookie authentication validation (#15751)
fix: improved request origin retrieval (#15919)
fix: generate:types inlines all blocks, add `forceInlineBlocks` property to use in plugin mcp (#15892)
fix: update broken custom components docs link in config types jsdoc (#15794)
fix: run `sanitizeWhereQuery` for join query access result (#15891)
fix: early return out of me access (#15883)
fix: restoreVersion validation for localized required fields (#15821)
fix: draft doc validation when duplicating docs (#15816)
fix: getFieldsToSign crashes when user missing group/tab fields (#15775)
fix: prevent silent data overwrites on concurrent edits (#15749)
fix: preserve block metadata in mergeLocalizedData and filterDataToSelectedLocales (#15715)
fix: return 400 for malformed JSON request bodies (#15706)
fix: globals not updating updatedAt when saving drafts (#15764)
fix(richtext-lexical): strip server-only properties from blocks in lexical client schema map (#15756)
templates: fix cloudflare logger error in with-cloudflare-d1 template (#15752)
fix: return early if pasteURL is not defined (#15748)
fix: prevent req.file leak between sequential duplicate() calls on upload collections (#15620)
fix: sanitize filenames in storage adapters (#15746)
fix: throw error for unknown query operators (#15739)
